name: cook-anything
description: Cook Anything — Tell us what you have. Discover what the world cooks with it.

scripts.prebuild: npm run trust:gate && tsx scripts/build-search-index.ts && tsx scripts/build-trust-manifest.ts && tsx scripts/build-companion-recipes.ts
scripts.preview: npm run build && npx wrangler dev
scripts.trust:gate: npm run validate && npm run licenses && tsx scripts/check-import-boundaries.ts && tsx scripts/check-exact-duplicates.ts && tsx scripts/check-trust.ts
scripts.test:trust: tsx scripts/test-phase2-trust.ts && tsx scripts/test-phase2-dietary-edge.ts && tsx scripts/test-worker-security-headers.ts
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler deploy
